use_cases: FAQ sections on product or documentation pages
Expandable content sections for detailed information
Hierarchical content navigation in knowledge bases
Privacy policy or terms of service breakdowns
Product feature comparison or specification details
ai_summary: A smooth animated accordion component built on Radix UI primitives with motion/react animations. Features blur transition effects and a rotating chevron indicator, providing an elegant way to organize and reveal collapsible content sections. Uses standard design tokens for clean, consistent styling across applications.
